title: Links to forms
excerpt: Is there a way to customize the link to a form that I am sending so it looks cleaner and more explicit of what the form is?

posts.author: AndreaB (Andrea Bartucca)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to customize the link to a form that I am sending so it looks cleaner and more explicit of what the form is?

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There,

You can shorten them with this option but I am not sure there is a way to customize the url.

image1848×656 34.2 KB

I would use the shortening link and then type out a title of the form and hyperlink the text to provide a more customized feel.

Hope this helps!

Mike B
Automation Architect
AXANEXA

posts.author: dominicw (Dominic)
posts.cookedHtml:
@AndreaB you can do this with Monday and Fillout.com

Fillout lets you customize the form link even on the free plan, more info on the Fillout help center (search “Customize form link”) - and integrates natively with Monday.com.

Hope that helps!

posts.author: alejandro.yanes94 (Alejandro Yanes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Adrea

is this still an issue you’re interested in solving? I am in the process of publishing a monday App to solve this specific problem, you can take a look here:

mndy.link

Short Links for monday.com

Create short links for your monday.com boards and forms

posts.author: techguy (Tahara)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, you can customize the link to your form by using URL shorteners like Bitly or TinyURL. These tools allow you to create shorter, more readable links that are easier to share. Additionally, you can include keywords related to your form in the link to make it more explicit and descriptive. Here is a authentic website that offers this feature, https://instaproapkk.in
